notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — Section 13 (Suggested MVP framing) explicitly lists features (phone, email, address, employment status, audit trail, vulnerable customer handling) as MVP scope without bounded deferral rationale, and Section 1 frames the problem primarily as a solution description ('the proposed feature would...'), collapsing D1 and triggering the categorical fail; additionally, no named out-of-scope items with reasons appear anywhere in the output, and personas are referenced only as generic roles without timing or cost dimensions.
